6301c74c-edb7-4b1f-a051-dc3bb9479cf3.label: text_chunk
6301c74c-edb7-4b1f-a051-dc3bb9479cf3.text:
CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (the “Agreement”) is made by the undersigned _________________________________of  ________________________________ with a principal place of business at _______________________________________ (individually and collectively (Recipient”), in favor of Vermont Electric Power Company, Inc.

d2473ac9-ba0f-4b83-91cb-a1b948559d12.label: text_chunk
d2473ac9-ba0f-4b83-91cb-a1b948559d12.text: and Vermont Transco LLC (collectively “VELCO”), with its primary address located at 366 Pinnacle Ridge Road, Rutland, Vermont 05701.

a8540bf8-2511-4fe4-a5ec-771ab8839340.label: text_chunk
a8540bf8-2511-4fe4-a5ec-771ab8839340.text: WHEREAS, the Recipient  has requested that VELCO disclose to the Recipient  certain information, all or a portion of which may be classified by VELCO as Critical Energy Infrastructure Information  (CEII)  or  BES Cyber System Information  (BCSI)  or  business confidential information (CI) (collectively referred to as Classified Information); and

41926a48-1e9b-42ce-a585-27b217ebbe70.label: text_chunk
41926a48-1e9b-42ce-a585-27b217ebbe70.text: WHEREAS, the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission has defined CEII as “specific engineering, vulnerability, or detailed design information about proposed or existing critical infrastructure that: (1) relates details about the production, generation, transportation, transmission, or distribution of energy; (2) could be useful to a person in planning an attack on critical infrastructure; (3) is exempt from mandatory disclosure under the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C.

3e3a5ab9-88e9-4c5d-92ad-bd259ec53d85.label: text_chunk
3e3a5ab9-88e9-4c5d-92ad-bd259ec53d85.text: § 552 (2000); and (4) does not simply give the general location of the critical infrastructure,” (see 18 C.F.R. § 388.113 (c) (1)); and

ab890b0e-cf11-4af9-bb18-30826f16752e.label: text_chunk
ab890b0e-cf11-4af9-bb18-30826f16752e.text: WHEREAS,  the  North American Electric Reliability Corporation Critical Infrastructure Protection Standards (NERC CIP), has  defined  BCSI  as “information about the BES Cyber System that could be used to gain unauthorized access or pose a security threat to the BES Cyber System.  BES Cyber System Information does not include individual pieces of information that by themselves do not pose a threat or  could not be used to allow unauthorized access to BES Cyber Systems;” and,

e4df3972-e938-4cbb-8062-68acec2fceb4.label: text_chunk
e4df3972-e938-4cbb-8062-68acec2fceb4.text:
WHEREAS, VELCO has identified and described, or will identify and describe, certain business sensitive information as CI in agreements or in the course of doing business; and,
WHEREAS, VELCO must comply with federal rules and regulations relative to CEII and/or BCSI; and

2d260b71-d4ef-4030-b7ff-140a4032e908.label: text_chunk
2d260b71-d4ef-4030-b7ff-140a4032e908.text:
WHEREAS, the Recipient  is working on ___ provide a short description of the project here ___________ requiring access to certain Classified Information which may be classified as BCSI, CEII, or CI
NOW, THEREFORE, for good and valuable consideration, the receipt and adequacy of which are hereby acknowledged, the parties hereto wish to enter into this Agreement to protect and safeguard the confidentiality of that information and agree as follows:

1be62e96-2f58-41e5-9237-bf5a9dfe3bf3.label: text_chunk
1be62e96-2f58-41e5-9237-bf5a9dfe3bf3.text:
VELCO Non-Disclosure Agreement – Rev 0 – Dec 21 2015
1

CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Section I: BES Cyber System Information (BCSI)

For purposes of this Agreement, “BCSI”  shall  mean:  (i) all information designated as such by VELCO, whether furnished before or after the date hereof, whether oral, written or recorded/electronic,

f5615c13-6752-4365-bf8e-e17bca5ab628.label: text_chunk
f5615c13-6752-4365-bf8e-e17bca5ab628.text:
and regardless of the manner in which it is furnished; and (ii) all reports, summaries, compilations, analyses, notes or other information which contain such information.

 Written information containing BCSI furnished by VELCO shall be labeled “ Confidential BCSI.

9e2f50be-c442-4b33-ba99-740fee15b531.label: text_chunk
9e2f50be-c442-4b33-ba99-740fee15b531.text:
”

Section II: Critical Energy Infrastructure Information (CEII)

For purposes of this Agreement, CEII shall mean:  (i) all information designated as such by VELCO, whether furnished before or after the date hereof, whether oral, written or recorded/electronic, and regardless of the manner in which it is furnished; and (ii) all reports, summaries, compilations, analyses, notes or other information which contain such information.

4bfcac76-bc1d-4932-a853-52edd9266455.label: text_chunk
4bfcac76-bc1d-4932-a853-52edd9266455.text:
Written information containing CEII that is furnished by VELCO shall be labeled “ Confidential CEII ”.

Section III: Business Confidential Information (CI)

For purposes of this agreement, CI  shall mean  any confidential, proprietary or trade secret information that is owned or controlled, or  is specifically marked or identified as “ Confidential ”,  by  VELCO  prior to disclosure  to Recipient.

c2e2bad8-5d24-4f67-a8f3-57fb26cdde4a.label: text_chunk
c2e2bad8-5d24-4f67-a8f3-57fb26cdde4a.text:
It includes information of third parties in VELCO’s possession that VELCO is obligated to keep confidential.

  CI subject to this Agreement may be in intangible form, such as information communicated orally or by visual observation, or may be embodied in tangible form, such as a document.

7a499a5e-6c43-4103-a115-e9824ec6dac3.label: text_chunk
7a499a5e-6c43-4103-a115-e9824ec6dac3.text:
The term "document" includes written memoranda, drawings, sketches, maps, training materials, specifications, notebook entries, photographs, graphic representations, firmware, computer information or software, information communicated by other electronic or magnetic media, or models.

Section IV: Use and Protection of Classified Information

1.

651e3d59-9802-487a-ba6d-d93d01465a17.label: text_chunk
651e3d59-9802-487a-ba6d-d93d01465a17.text:
Information labeled “ Confidential  BCSI ”  shall  be treated and protected in accordance with the enforceable  version of the NERC CIP-011 Cyber Security –  Information Protection standard  and shall  require a Recipient  background check and Recipient’s successful completion of  VELCO-designated training in addition to compliance with the other requirements of and protections in this Agreement; and

2. Recipient shall keep all  Classified  Information  in a secure place.

f06c3ac1-13ab-444a-92ba-f3b95c8f0dcd.label: text_chunk
f06c3ac1-13ab-444a-92ba-f3b95c8f0dcd.text: Recipient shall limit access to Classified Information to other Recipients who also have the right pursuant to an agreement with VELCO to access the identical material.

0342bd54-4066-4a72-8039-3009f045090a.label: text_chunk
0342bd54-4066-4a72-8039-3009f045090a.text:
Any notes made by Recipient containing  Classified  Information  shall be marked  and designated in accordance with
VELCO Non-Disclosure Agreement – Rev 0 – Dec 21 2015
2

CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Sections I, II, and/or III above, and Recipient shall protect the Classified Information in accordance with that designation.

3.

f98a458a-2023-4f3c-bb09-ba52d0a5569b.label: text_chunk
f98a458a-2023-4f3c-bb09-ba52d0a5569b.text: The Recipient shall exercise reasonable care to maintain the confidentiality and secrecy of the Classified Information, and shall not divulge Classified  Information  to any third party without the prior written consent of the VELCO.

c74b1d34-7835-4e3c-a17d-52707513fdef.label: text_chunk
c74b1d34-7835-4e3c-a17d-52707513fdef.text:
The foregoing notwithstanding, the Recipient may disclose classified information  to its employees or contractors (hereafter  Representatives)  to the extent each such Representative has a need to know such information to conduct the work referenced in the  Whereas clauses,  and  shall comply with Recipient’s obligations under this Agreement.  The Recipient is responsible for its Representative’s breach of the terms of this Agreement.

4.

32b593d2-1097-47e9-99d8-0f5a633eb378.label: text_chunk
32b593d2-1097-47e9-99d8-0f5a633eb378.text:
Recipient and each of its Representatives shall use all Classified Information disclosed by VELCO solely in connection with the work referenced in the Whereas clauses and shall not use, directly or indirectly, any information for any other purpose without  VELCO’s prior written consent.

  A  Recipient  will not use or allow a  Representative to use Classified  Information  directly or indirectly for any illegal  purpose,  non-legitimate purpose, or any purpose other than the work referenced in the Whereas clause.

e66448b6-49d2-4d5a-a22a-b750deded653.label: text_chunk
e66448b6-49d2-4d5a-a22a-b750deded653.text:
5. In the event that the Recipient is required to disclose Classified Information by subpoena,

 law or other directive of a court, administrative agency, or arbitration panel, the Recipient will  provide VELCO with immediate notice of such request in order to enable VELCO (and Recipient shall cooperate fully with VELCO) to  seek an appropriate protective order or other remedy.

10e5abda-e9e1-4a77-84c9-e1cbcd0cb5f0.label: text_chunk
10e5abda-e9e1-4a77-84c9-e1cbcd0cb5f0.text:
Recipient shall also consult with VELCO to identify  steps available to quash or narrow the scope of such request or legal process.

  VELCO may in its sole discretion waive compliance, in whole or in part,  with the terms of this Agreement.

90f21add-bca8-43ae-908c-65720457299b.label: text_chunk
90f21add-bca8-43ae-908c-65720457299b.text:
In the event that such protective order or other remedy is not obtained, or VELCO waives compliance, the Recipient shall furnish only that portion of the Classified Information which the Recipient/’s counsel advises is legally required to comply with a governmental order or directive and  shall  exercise best efforts to obtain assurance that confidential treatment will be accorded such Classified Information.

6.

4be5964b-e83b-47e0-b024-87697c87d097.label: text_chunk
4be5964b-e83b-47e0-b024-87697c87d097.text:
In the event that VELCO, in its sole discretion, so requests,

 the Recipient will promptly return  to VELCO or destroy in accordance with VELCO’s instructions, all Classified Information, including  all copies, reproductions, compilations, analyses or extracts thereof, whether electronic or paper media.

7. Change in Status.

0e7fbe6f-a798-4ff3-b6b0-3163f861ffda.label: text_chunk
0e7fbe6f-a798-4ff3-b6b0-3163f861ffda.text:
If there is a change in status of the Recipient to his/her employer, he/she must inform VELCO immediately in writing at the address given above (Attention:  Information Protection Coordinator) and follow VELCO’s instructions with respect to disposition of the Classified Information.VELCO Non-Disclosure Agreement – Rev 0 – Dec 21 2015
3

CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

8.

54caa877-ba48-411c-b0bc-0c0d8bc909c2.label: text_chunk
54caa877-ba48-411c-b0bc-0c0d8bc909c2.text:
CEII  and BCSI “on Loan”.

  CEII and BCSI  information provided pursuant to this Agreement is “on loan.”    If the Recipient  is an employee of a federal or state agency, he/she must note that the Classified Information is not the property of the agency, and is not subject to Freedom of Information  Act, Vermont’s Public Records Act , or similar statutes.

5e8f008b-1232-4766-8c24-3b1ceba0e212.label: text_chunk
5e8f008b-1232-4766-8c24-3b1ceba0e212.text:
In addition, if the Recipient is an employee of the State of Vermont, he/she must note that the information  qualifies under federal law for restricted and limited use/distribution, and may be disclosed only  to specifically designated persons, and in both cases, with prior VELCO approval.

9. No Warranty. The Classified  Information is provided “as is” with all faults.

d5bd8283-c435-4231-8ef0-dbaaa2099a33.label: text_chunk
d5bd8283-c435-4231-8ef0-dbaaa2099a33.text:
In no event shall VELCO be liable for the accuracy or completeness of the Classified  Information. VELCO shall not have liability to the Recipient, or any other person or entity, for the Recipient’s use of any Classified Information disclosed pursuant to this Agreement.

10. Equitable Relief; Audit.

  The provisions of this Agreement are necessary for the protection of the business and goodwill of the parties and are considered by the parties to be reasonable for such purpose.

596cfdc6-7d5d-4f1d-9e6d-0a81bc7b5fc5.label: text_chunk
596cfdc6-7d5d-4f1d-9e6d-0a81bc7b5fc5.text:
Recipient  agrees that any breach of this Agreement would cause VELCO substantial and irreparable harm and, therefore, in the event of any such breach or threatened breach, in addition to other remedies which may be available, VELCO  shall have the right to specific performance and other injunctive and equitable relief, it being acknowledged that legal remedies are inadequate. VELCO may audit the Recipient’s compliance with this Agreement.

11. Survival.

2cc0b3de-56a6-4a95-80bb-9462adc21e10.label: text_chunk
2cc0b3de-56a6-4a95-80bb-9462adc21e10.text:
The Recipient/ remains bound by these provisions unless VELCO rescinds the Classified Information designation.

12. No Waiver.

 The Recipient understands and agrees that no failure or delay by VELCO in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any right, power or privilege hereunder.

13. Governing Law.

236c27dc-0e89-4bca-a618-2262cfd782dc.label: text_chunk
236c27dc-0e89-4bca-a618-2262cfd782dc.text:
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Vermont without regard to its conflicts of laws principles.

14. Assignment Prohibited.  Any assignment  of the Recipient’s  rights,

 obligations or duties under this Agreement without VELCO’s prior written consent shall be void.

15. Entire Agreement.

4fc5a3e8-143f-42cf-9c0f-b1608b9bd517.label: text_chunk
4fc5a3e8-143f-42cf-9c0f-b1608b9bd517.text:
This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties concerning the protection of Classified  Information  and no modification of this Agreement or waiver of the terms and conditions hereof shall be binding upon the parties, unless approved in writing by each of them.VELCO Non-Disclosure Agreement – Rev 0 – Dec 21 2015
4

CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

16. Severability.

74da842a-5f0e-40e4-8f13-a5dd05c32959.label: text_chunk
74da842a-5f0e-40e4-8f13-a5dd05c32959.text: If any provision or provisions of this Agreement shall be held to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, the validity, legality and enforceability of the remaining provisions shall not in any way be affected or impaired thereby.IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date set forth below.

8ab608a2-835a-4c38-8299-0c91ed4b695a.label: text_chunk
8ab608a2-835a-4c38-8299-0c91ed4b695a.text:
NDA For Individual Only Check Here:  NDA For Company  – By signing here, you represent that your company assumes responsibility for your employees’, contractors’, and  consultants’ compliance with this NDA. Check Here:  Recipient Signature Name (please print) Title Organization Date Address Phone
VELCO Non-Disclosure Agreement – Rev 0 – Dec 21 2015

community_summary.1:
**Summary of Relationships Involving the Recipient and VELCO**

1. **Information Requests and Disclosure**: The Recipient has established a direct relationship with VELCO by requesting the disclosure of certain information, which necessitates a cooperative communication dynamic.

2. **Access to Classified Information**: The Recipient requires access to Classified Information for a project, indicating a critical need for sensitive data. They are responsible for managing and limiting access to this information, ensuring confidentiality and compliance with legal standards.

3. **Handling of Confidential Information**: The Recipient receives and is responsible for the confidentiality of both BCSI and other Classified Information. This includes the obligation to handle such information according to the terms set forth in the VELCO Non-Disclosure Agreement.

4. **Authorization and Representation**: The Recipient has Representatives authorized to access Classified Information based on their need to know. This relationship underscores the importance of controlled access to sensitive data.

5. **Notification Obligations**: The Recipient is required to notify VELCO if compelled to disclose classified information, reinforcing a relationship of accountability and transparency.

6. **Employment Context**: The Recipient is employed by the State of Vermont, which provides a framework for their responsibilities and obligations regarding the handling of classified information.

7. **Compliance and Approval**: The Recipient must obtain prior approval from VELCO before disclosing any information, highlighting a relationship of authority and compliance with established protocols.

8. **Binding Agreements**: The Recipient is bound by the terms of the Agreement with VELCO, which includes stipulations for compliance and consequences for any breaches, emphasizing the legal and ethical dimensions of their relationship.

Overall, the relationships outlined reflect a structured framework of responsibility, authority, and compliance between the Recipient and VELCO, particularly concerning the management of classified information.
community_summary.2:
**Summary of Relationships Involving VELCO**

1. **Classification and Identification of Information**:
   - VELCO classifies certain information as **Critical Energy Infrastructure Information (CEII)**, indicating its role in determining the sensitivity of such information. It also identifies and describes business-sensitive information categorized as **Critical Infrastructure Information (CI)** in various agreements and business activities.

2. **Regulatory Compliance**:
   - VELCO is required to comply with federal regulations regarding CEII, highlighting a regulatory relationship with this category of information. Additionally, VELCO designates what constitutes CEII, showcasing its authority in this domain.

3. **Provision and Control of Confidential Information**:
   - VELCO furnishes **Business Confidential Sensitive Information (BCSI)** and controls the dissemination of **Classified Information**, granting consent for its disclosure. It possesses CI that it is obligated to keep confidential.

4. **Relationships with Recipients**:
   - VELCO discloses confidential information to a **Recipient** under specific confidentiality terms. The Recipient must cooperate with VELCO to seek protective measures when classified information is requested and is required to consult with VELCO to address legal requests. The Recipient must also comply with VELCO's directives regarding the handling of classified information.

5. **Liability and Enforcement**:
   - VELCO limits its liability concerning the accuracy or completeness of the classified information provided to the Recipient. It retains the right to enforce the terms of agreements with the Recipient in case of breaches, indicating a legal relationship that emphasizes accountability.

6. **Operational Governance**:
   - VELCO operates under the laws of **Vermont**, which influences its activities and regulatory compliance, establishing a framework for its operations and relationships.

This summary encapsulates VELCO's critical role in managing sensitive information, its regulatory obligations, and its collaborative relationships with recipients of confidential information, all while operating within a defined legal framework.

This definition underscores the importance of protecting BCSI to ensure the security and integrity of critical infrastructure.
